questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the advice.
"Drop, cover and hold on during an earthquake. Stay away from windows."
Question: What is the safest action?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Drop, cover and hold on
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Verilen talimatta güvenli yöntem açıkça belirtilmiştir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the weather bulletin.
"Heavy rain may cause flash floods in low areas tonight."
Question: Who is at greater risk?
options: Ek Soru 1 — People in low areas
Ek Soru 1 — People on high hills
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Bülten low areas için risk uyarısı veriyor.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the warning.
"Secure loose balcony items and avoid unnecessary travel during storm."
Question: Why secure balcony items?
options: Ek Soru 1 — To prevent wind accidents
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Şiddetli rüzgarda savrulan nesneler tehlike yaratır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the report.
"After weeks without rain, soil dried and crops decreased."
Question: Which natural event is described?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Uzun süre yağış olmaması kuraklıktır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the emergency bag list.
water, flashlight, batteries, first-aid kit, whistle
Question: This bag is prepared for ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Liste afet/acil durum hazırlığı içindir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the context.
After an earthquake, teacher moved students to assembly area after shaking stopped.
Question: Why assembly area?
options: Ek Soru 1 — For safer open gathering
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Assembly area güvenli toplanma noktasıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the map note.
Red zone: possible landslide after heavy rain
Green zone: low risk
Question: Where should houses be avoided?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Landslide riski yüksek olan red zone'da yapılaşma risklidir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the tsunami warning.
"If you feel strong coastal shaking, move to higher ground immediately."
Question: Why higher ground?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Avoid incoming sea waves
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Tsunami dalgalarından korunmak için yüksek yere çıkılır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]
questions.ipucu: Coastal shaking + wave risk ilişkisini kur.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the heatwave news.
"A ten-day heatwave led hospitals to warn elderly people to stay hydrated."
Question: Which precaution is emphasized?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Close all windows forever
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Stay hydrated ifadesi su tüketimini vurgular.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the preparedness plan.
School runs earthquake drills monthly and updates evacuation routes each term.
Question: Main benefit of regular drills is ...
options: Ek Soru 1 — faster and calmer emergency response
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Düzenli tatbikat kriz anında doğru ve hızlı hareketi sağlar.

[GitHub Ek Test — Natural Forces]
